title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis states humanity may be in the foothills of the singularity, with AI agents now capable of coding, research, and scientific work. The video discusses whether imperfect but increasingly useful AI has already become transformative enough to accelerate real-world workflows and scientific discovery.
